text.title: ab-testing-implementation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ab-testing-implementation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent reuses the binary conversion analyzer for revenue per user or latency p95.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Revenue per user is a ratio metric (sum of revenue / count of users); latency p95 is a quantile metric. Both require different test statistics than the two-proportion z-test.

failure-mode.description: Reporting only the primary metric result and ignoring secondary and guardrail metrics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Optimization on a single metric often degrades others. Ship decisions require the full picture of what improved and what regressed.
